note: WHO guideline is 600 mg/L. EPA secondary standard is 500 mg/L. 1 ppm = 1 mg/L for TDS.

thresholds.label: Caution
thresholds.message: Slightly elevated TDS. May affect taste. Monitor regularly.

thresholds.label: Warning
thresholds.message: High TDS. Water quality is poor. Treatment is recommended.

thresholds.label: High Warning
thresholds.message: Very high TDS. Not suitable for regular consumption without treatment.

thresholds.label: Critical
thresholds.message: Extremely high TDS. Water is unsuitable for drinking.
